rules.name: No arbitrary font sizes
rules.rationale: All font sizes must come from the typographic scale. Arbitrary sizes break visual rhythm and make Kaizen impossible — you can't improve what you can't measure.
rules.source: Linear typography system; Bringhurst typographic scale

rules.name: Body text line length limit
rules.rationale: Optimal reading comfort: 45-75 characters per line (66 ideal). Below 35 causes excessive line breaks; above 75 causes tracking loss.
rules.source: Bringhurst 'Elements of Typographic Style'; WCAG SC 1.4.8

rules.name: No arbitrary colour values
rules.rationale: All colours must come from the token system. Arbitrary hex/rgb values break theming, dark mode, and visual consistency.
rules.source: Atlassian Stylelint plugin; Shadcn token system

rules.name: Maximum distinct card styles per view
rules.rationale: More than 3 visually distinct card patterns on one screen creates cognitive overhead. Users must learn multiple container metaphors. Consolidate to max 3: primary, secondary, metric.

rules.name: Spacing uses token values only
rules.rationale: Arbitrary spacing breaks visual rhythm. Every spacing value must be from the 4px/8px grid.
rules.source: Atlassian 8px system; design token best practice

rules.name: Maximum interactive elements per viewport
rules.rationale: High interactive density increases cognitive load. If viewport has >40 interactive elements, consider progressive disclosure or grouping.

rules.name: Animation duration constraints
rules.rationale: No animation longer than 500ms. No animation shorter than 50ms (imperceptible). All durations from token set.
rules.source: Material Design motion guidelines; Nielsen response time limits

rules.name: Text contrast ratio (body)
rules.rationale: WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text. Non-negotiable.

rules.name: KPI card structure
rules.rationale: Every KPI card must have a large value and a descriptive label. Delta indicator and sparkline are optional. Value is the dominant visual element.
rules.source: Data viz best practice; design-foundations skill
